name: User drafts their first quote by typing a one-liner
description: Brand-new account, first chat message describes a small fence repair. Assistant should produce a single-line quote without 20 follow-up questions, and surface a draft action card the user can tap to send.

persona.name: Marcus Lee
persona.role: Solo handyman, day 1 on the app
persona.context: Just verified his phone. Has never created a quote in the app before.

steps.action: Types: 'Fence repair for the Patel place — $350.' and hits Enter
steps.expect: Message appears immediately in the chat with a sending indicator
Assistant text + an action_card titled 'Fence repair — Patel' with one line item at $350.00; no clarifying questions
Quote moves from draft to sent; chat shows confirmation; new thread appears in the sidebar

evaluationCriteria.check: Action card visually distinct from chat bubbles; line item amounts right-aligned
Time from user Enter to first streamed token <1.5s on warm path
Backend persists the quote with amount in cents (35000), not dollars (350)
Streaming text is in a live region; screen reader users hear it without spam
